allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "nothing listening on 3000" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "STILL LISTENING" } else { "port 3000 free" })
